## AbstractQuery.updateMany() method

Based on the query, matched documents will be updated

**Signature:**

```typescript
updateMany(query: QueryRootFilter, payload: QueryExecutorUpdateManyUpdater<DocumentType>, options?: QueryUpdateManyOptions): this;
```

</td><td>

Update query to find match


</td></tr>

</td><td>

[QueryExecutorUpdateManyUpdater](./iodm-query.queryexecutorupdatemanyupdater.md)<!-- -->&lt;DocumentType&gt;


</td><td>

Callback to update the found document


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

options


</td><td>

[QueryUpdateManyOptions](./iodm-query.queryupdatemanyoptions.md)


</td><td>

_(Optional)_ Query options


</td></tr>
</tbody></table>

**Returns:**

this


## Example


```ts
const query = new Query(idb, "store-name");
await query.updateMany({ $key: keyRange }, newDoc, options);
```
